reviews.comment: The Gold Hydra Facial is pure magic. My skin has never glowed like this before. The matte black & gold interior smells like pure royalty!
Sophia Rose did an amazing job with my hair smoothing. The precision and luxury treatment is unmatched.
Absolutely loved the bridal styling session. Highly recommended package for weddings.
